title: Related if/else if statements should avoid having the same condition
description: Related "if/else if" statements should not have the same conditionAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugcertunusedpitfallWhy is this an issue?More InfoA chain ofif/else ifstatements is evaluated from top to bottom. At most, only one branch will be executed: the first one with a condition that evaluates totrue.Therefore, duplicating a condition automatically leads to dead code. Usually, this is due to a copy/paste error.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Related if/else if statements have duplicate conditions - creates unreachable dead code
Duplicate condition in if/else if chain detected - second condition will never be evaluated
Potential duplicate condition pattern detected in if/else if statement chain
Common duplicate condition pattern found - verify if/else if logic is correct
